all_candidates.title: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
all_candidates.summary: While there’s been plenty of debate about AI sycophancy, a new study by Stanford computer scientists attempts to measure how harmful that tendency might be.

all_candidates.title: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
all_candidates.summary: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.

all_candidates.title: Anthropic’s Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
all_candidates.summary: Estimates for total Claude consumer users are all over the map (we've seen figures ranging from 18 million to 30 million). Anthropic hasn't disclosed this data, but a spokesperson did tell TechCrunch that Claude paid subscriptions have more than doubled this year.
